question: Bihar state mein sabhi districts ki list banao.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar';

question: Assam state ke saare districts ko alphabetical order mein list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Bihar state ke andar sabhi districts ki ek alphabetical list provide karo.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Har state ke liye districts ki ginti pata karo, aur state ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME;

question: Assam ke districts ke naam batao jisme ek se zyada rural sub-district ho, alphabetical order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Sabhi districts ki ek list provide karo, alphabetically organize karo state ke basis pe aur fir district name ke basis pe.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Assam ke top paanch districts ke naam batao jo ek se zyada sub-district rakhte hain, aur unhe reverse alphabetical order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME DESC LIMIT 5

question: India ke saare districts list karo, aur unke state ke naam bhi batado.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T3.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India';

question: India ke sabhi districts ki ek alphabetized list provide karo, jo unke respective states ke basis par organize ho.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Assam mein aise districts ke naam batayein jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar'

question: Assam ke districts identify karo jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T1.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar')

question: Assam state ka naam confirm karo, un states ki list se jinke paas district information record hai.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';

question: Assam aur Andaman and Nicobar Islands ke states mein sabhi districts list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';

question: Andaman and Nicobar Islands ya Nicobars district ke liye, saare states ke names aur unke corresponding districts list karo, alphabetically state ke hisaab se sort karke.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Sare rural sub-districts ki ek alphabetical list banao, jismein unke names aur IDs shamil hon.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Har state ke liye, area type ke hisaab se sub-districts ki sankhya ka breakdown do, state name ke alphabetical order mein sort karo aur phir highest count ke basis pe.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karke.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Assam state ke andar jo sub-districts hain, unke naam aur area types list karo, alphabetical order mein naam ke hisaab se sorted.
sql: SELECT T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sab sub-districts ke names aur area types list karo, alphabetically sort karna area type aur name ke hisaab se.
sql: SELECT T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA ASC, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Top 5 states kaun se hain jinke paas sabse zyada rural sub-districts hain?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sabhi gaon ke ilakon ke naam, unke sambandhit district aur state ke saath list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo sirf urban areas ke category mein aate hain aur unme koi rural hissa nahi hai.
sql: SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' EXCEPT SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Sub-districts ke saare naam list karo jo sirf urban areas mein classified hain, alphabetically sort karke.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Ek list banao jismein 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' ka naam ho, saath hi saare rural sub-districts ke names bhi hon.
sql: SELECT STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' UNION SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question: September 2020 ke allopathic outpatient attendance figures dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.MONTH_NAME = 'September, 2020' AND T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2020'

question: December 2022 ke outpatient IDs aur unke allopathic attendance counts list karo, sirf recorded visits wale, aur attendance ke hisaab se highest se lowest sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.OUTPATIENT_ID, T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.MONTH_NAME = 'December, 2022' AND T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.OUTPATIENT_ID, T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC HAVING SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 ORDER BY T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC DESC

question: Saal dar saal allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronological order mein.
sql: SELECT T3.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID GROUP BY T3.YEAR_VALUE ORDER BY T3.YEAR_VALUE ASC

question: 2022 ke months ko unke total allopathic outpatient attendance ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se lowest tak.
sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: 2022 ke months ko allopathic outpatient visits ke total number ke basis par highest se lowest tak rank karo.
sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: 2022 ke saare allopathic outpatient attendance ka monthly breakdown do, highest se lowest volume ke order mein ranked.
sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_YEAR AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID WHERE T1.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance wale sub-districts dhundho, lekin 2021 mein inka koi attendance report nahi hua ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0

question: Woh sub-districts pata karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui thi, lekin 2021 mein aisi koi attendance nahi thi.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Kaunse sub-districts ne 2021 aur 2022 dono saal mein outpatient services record kiye the?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE IN ('2021', '2022') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T4.YEAR_VALUE) = 2

question: 2022 ke saal wale mahino ya phir 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient visits record karne wale mahino ko pehchaan karo, aur unhe alphabetically sort karke dikhao.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.MONTH_NAME FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000.0000000000000000 OR T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' ORDER BY T2.MONTH_NAME

question: Saare recorded saaloon mein allopathic outpatient attendance ka annual total batao.
sql: SELECT T3.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID GROUP BY T3.YEAR_VALUE

question: Saal ke hisaab se, rural aur urban dono areas mein total allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronologically order karke.
sql: SELECT T2.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T4 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T4.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T4.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ORDER BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ASC

question: Kaun se rural sub-districts ne saal 2021 mein 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient attendance record ki thi?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 5000

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke allopathic outpatient visits ke total number se rank karo, highest attendance se start karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke saal bhar record kiye gaye allopathic outpatient visits ke total number ke hisaab se rank karo, highest attendance se shuru karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: 2021 mein top 5 rural sub-districts kaun se the jahan allopathic outpatient attendance sabse zyada tha?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 5 rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein allopathic outpatient attendance ka total sabse zyada raha ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Konsa paanch gaon ke ilaake ne saal 2021 mein sabse zyada allopathic outpatient attendance record kiya hai?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke pure saal mein record ki gayi allopathic outpatient attendance ke total volume ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se shuru karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: Rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui hai, lekin un sub-districts ko exclude karo jinke urban areas mein bhi usi saal reported attendance ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo 2021 mein rural aur urban dono areas mein outpatient services report kiye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2

question: 2021 ke liye, saare rural sub-districts ke Vitamin A (Dose 1) aur Rotavirus (Dose 1) immunization figures dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1, T2.ROTAVIRUS_1 FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021';

question: 2021 ke liye, Vitamin A ki pehli dose ke total count ke hisaab se rural sub-districts ko rank karo, aur saath hi har ek ka pehli Rotavirus vaccination ka average number bhi dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1), AVG(T2.ROTAVIRUS_1) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) DESC

question: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se total Rotavirus 1 aur Vitamin A Dose 1 ke counts ka breakdown do.
sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_1), SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Sub-districts ko 2021 ke pure saal mein diye gaye pehle dose Vitamin A supplements ki kul sankhya ke hisaab se rank karo, sabse zyada se shuru karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) DESC

question: Sub-districts ko ranking karo based on total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered during 2021, highest se start karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) DESC

question: 2021 mein top 5 gaon ke ilaake kaun se hain jahan Rotavirus ki teesri dose ke sabse zyada teekikaran huye the?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 2021 mein, kaunse paanch gaon ke sub-districts ne Rotavirus 3 immunization ka sabse zyada total number record kiya?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Kaun sub-districts mein 2021 ke saal mein Rotavirus vaccine ki ek first dose report hui thi, lekin third dose bilkul nahi?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_1) > 0 AND SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) = 0

question: Konsi sub-districts mein 2022 ke dauraan Vitamin A (Dose 1) aur Rotavirus (Dose 1) dono ki 500 se zyada doses record hui thi?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) > 500 AND SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_1) > 500

question: 2021 mein, un sub-districts ko identify karo jo ya toh rural areas mein 15 se zyada Rotavirus 1 immunizations report kiye, ya phir urban areas mein 1 se zyada Vitamin A first dose administrations kiye, aur unhe alphabetically list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND ( (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.ROTAVIRUS_1 > 15.0000000000000000) OR (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 > 1.00000000000000000000) ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Batao immunization IDs aur unki counts, jo 10 saal se zyada umar ke bachon ke liye hain, jinhe TT10 ya TD10 vaccines rural areas mein 2021 ke dauraan diye gaye, aur ise vaccinated bachon ki sankhya ke hisaab se sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT_ID, T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 0 ORDER BY T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10

question: 2021 ke liye, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se, 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ka total immunization count provide karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Batao 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ki immunization ka total number, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Sub-districts ko rank karo, unke basis par 2021 mein 10 aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ko mili adolescent immunizations ki total sankhya ke hisaab se, lekin jinme koi records nahi hai unhe chhod kar.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) DESC

question: Top 5 rural sub-districts kaun se hain jahan 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada umar ke bacchon ko sabse zyada immunization mila?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan September 2020 mein 10 saal se zyada umar ke 34 se adhik bacchon ko TT ya TD vaccine ki pehli dose mili ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 34.0000000000000000 AND T3.MONTH_NAME = 'September, 2020' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2020'

question: Un sub-districts ko pata karo jahan 2021 mein kam se kam ek bacha, jo 5 saal se zyada umar ka ho, ne doosra DPT booster liya ho, khaas taur par dono rural aur urban areas mein.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_5_YEARS_DPT_5_2ND_BOOSTER > 0.00000000000000000000 AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein, dono rural aur urban areas mein, kam se kam ek bachche ko DPT ke second booster (DPT 5) mila ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_5_YEARS_DPT_5_2ND_BOOSTER > 0 AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein, urban aur rural dono areas mein, kam se kam ek bachche ne second DPT booster (5 saal ke baad) liya ho, aur unhe alphabetically list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_5_YEARS_DPT_5_2ND_BOOSTER > 0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 2021 mein un sub-districts ko dhoondo jo ya toh 34 se zyada bachon (10 saal se bade) ko TT10/TD10 immunization diya ho, ya phir urban areas hain jahan ek se zyada bachon (16 saal se bade) ko TT16/TD16 dose mili ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE (T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 34.0) OR (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16 > 1.0) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Sare rural sub-districts ke names aur district IDs list karo.
sql: SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Sabhi rural sub-districts ke IDs aur names, unke parent district IDs ke saath, provide karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Area type ke hisaab se, 2021 mein antenatal care ke liye register hone wale pregnant women ki total sankhya aur chaar ya usse zyada checkups wale women ki average rate ka breakdown dijiye.
sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), AVG(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Kaunse rural sub-districts mein 2021 ke saal mein kam se kam ek pregnant woman ne antenatal care ke liye registration karaya tha?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 0

question: Rural sub-districts ko list karo jahan 2021 mein antenatal care ke liye 10 se zyada pregnant women register hui thi, aur unhe highest se lowest registration count ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 10 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: Urban sub-districts ko rank karo, jismein sabse zyada se shuru karte hue, 2021 ke saal mein chaar ya usse adhik antenatal care checkups paane wali pregnant women ki kul sankhya ke hisaab se.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) DESC

question: Urban sub-districts ko rank karo, jismein 2021 mein char ya zyada antenatal checkups wali pregnant women ka total count sabse zyada se shuru karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T3.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) DESC

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein 500 se zyada mahilaon ne pehle trimester mein antenatal care ke liye registration karaya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) > 500

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein pehle trimester mein paanch se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) > 5

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein pehle trimester mein paanch se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) > 5

question: 2022 mein maternal ANC registrations wale rural sub-districts dhundho, lekin 2021 mein koi record na ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021';

question: Rural sub-districts ke naam, alphabetical order mein list karo, jahan 5,000 se zyada pregnant women ne antenatal care ke liye register kiya hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 5000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Sabhi rural sub-districts aur woh sub-districts bhi dhundho jahan ek hi mahine mein 5,000 se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' UNION SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.MONTH_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 5000

question: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein dikhao total number of pregnant women jinka hemoglobin level 11 se kam hai, aur average number of hemoglobin tests jo conduct kiye gaye.
sql: SELECT T2.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T1.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T1.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T2.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se ek breakdown do, jismein total pregnant women ka count ho jinka hemoglobin level 11 se kam hai, aur average hemoglobin tests conducted ka bhi, specifically un areas ke liye jahan low-hemoglobin cases ki count 38 se kam hai, sorted by total cases descending order mein.
sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T2.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 < 38.0000000000000000 AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC

question: Konsi rural sub-districts ne saal 2021 mein 11 se kam hemoglobin level wale pregnant women ke 500 se zyada cases report kiye?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 500

question: Kaun se gaon ke ilaake mein 2021 mein 11 se kam hemoglobin wale 500 se zyada pregnant women report kiye gaye?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 500

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types ka breakdown do, jismein pehle saal ke liye hemoglobin level 11 se kam wale pregnant women ka total count dikhao, sirf un records par focus karo jahan count 38 se kam hai, aur results ko highest se lowest tak rank karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_ID = 1 AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 < 38.0000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC

question: Top 5 rural sub-districts batayein jahan 2021 mein hemoglobin level 11 se kam wale pregnant women ki sabse zyada recording hui ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan September 2020 mein 11 se kam hemoglobin wale pregnant women 38 se kam the, lekin jahan koi recorded cases nahi hain un areas ko chhod kar.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 < 38.0000000000000000 AND T3.MONTH_VALUE = 'September, 2020' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2020' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 0.00000000000000000000

question: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan September 2020 mein 5 se zyada pregnant women ka hemoglobin level 11 se kam record hua ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.MONTH_VALUE = 'September, 2020' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2020' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 5

question: Kaunse sub-districts mein 2021 ke dauraan, rural areas mein pregnant women ke hemoglobin levels 11 se kam report hue, lekin urban areas mein aisi koi cases nahi the?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-districts ko pehchano jo ya toh rural areas ke roop mein vargikrit hain ya jahan 11 se kam hemoglobin level wale 38 se zyada pregnant women ne report kiya hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 38.0 OR T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question: Sabhi rural sub-districts ko identify karo, khaas taur par unhe highlight karo jahan 500 se zyada pregnant women ka hemoglobin level 11 se neeche record kiya gaya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 500 UNION SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question: Rural sub-districts ka alphabetical list banao, saath mein unke district IDs bhi batayein.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_ID, T1.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: 2021 mein total oral pill cycles aur condoms ke distribution ka breakdown do, area ke type ke hisaab se categorized karke.
sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: 2021 mein, oral pill cycles aur condoms ke distribution ka breakdown area type ke hisaab se do, jahan active distribution ho raha hai, un areas ko pill distribution ke volume ke anusaar rank karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC

question: Rural sub-districts ko list karo jinhone 5,000 se zyada condoms distribute kiye hain, aur unhe highest se lowest distribution volume ke hisaab se rank karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC

question: 2021 mein, top 5 rural sub-districts ka pata lagao jinhone saal bhar combined oral pill cycles ka sabse zyada distribution kiya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 5 rural sub-districts ko identify karo jo saal 2021 mein combined oral pill cycles ka sabse zyada total distribution kiya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 2021 mein condom distribute karne wale sub-districts aur unke area types ka ek ranked list do, har ke liye total quantity bhi dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC

question: Kaunse sub-districts ne 2022 mein combined oral pill cycles distribute kiye, lekin condoms ek bhi nahi baate?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 AND SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) = 0

question: Kaunse sub-districts ne 2022 mein combined oral pill cycles distribute kiye, lekin condom ek bhi nahi baate?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0.0000000000000000 AND SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) = 0.0000000000000000

question: Sub-districts ko alphabetically list karo, jinhone 5,000 se zyada oral pill cycles ya 10,000 se adhik condoms distribute kiye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED > 5000 OR T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED > 10000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
